messages.content: paraphrase this: Please tell Sinu how much they need in order to purchase Adobe Acrobat Pro license.
Please inform Sinu about the amount required to buy an Adobe Acrobat Pro license.
paraphrase this: You can just inform Waleed to log-off from Teams and login again to see the result.
Simply tell Waleed to sign out of Teams and then sign back in to view the outcome.
paraphrase respectfully: You can just inform Waleed to log-off from Teams and login again to see the result.
Kindly request Waleed to log out from Teams and then log back in to observe the result.
paraphrase this respectfully: As we discussed, issue has been resolved by Robin.
As previously mentioned, Robin has successfully resolved the issue.
paraphrase this: Based on our assesment, your laptop need to add more RAM, at least 16GB to make it more stable and not hanging
Following our evaluation, we recommend upgrading your laptop's RAM to at least 16GB to enhance stability and prevent it from freezing.
parphrase this: After management approval, we're purchase the RAM.
Following approval from management, we will proceed to purchase the RAM.
paraphrase this: I'd like to ask if Tariq returned any laptop or PC provided by Milestone?
Could you tell me if Tariq has returned any laptop or PC issued by Milestone?
paraphrase respectfully: I'd like to ask if Tariq returned any laptop or PC provided by Milestone?
May I kindly inquire if Tariq has returned any laptop or PC that was provided by Milestone?
paraphrase this: I confirm that we received the laptop
I can verify that the laptop has been received.
paraphrase this: Laptop is under process and need approval from management.
The laptop is currently being processed and requires approval from management.
paraphrase this: the PR for laptop is under process and need approval from management.
The purchase request for the laptop is in progress and awaiting management's approval.
paraphrase this: Only managers can raise request for email creation. Further more, we need information for the user that will use email. Hence this ticket is closed.
Only managers have the authority to initiate requests for email creation. Additionally, we require user information for the email account. Therefore, this ticket has been closed.
paraphrase this: Yes, it's already SSD. I'll check it again and do something else to make laptop faster.
Indeed, it is already an SSD. I will inspect it once more and take further steps to enhance the laptop's speed.
paraphrase this: To able to edit and save PDF, we need to install Adobe Acrobat Pro. If you are interested, please create ticket as shown in screenshot:
In order to edit and save PDF files, Adobe Acrobat Pro must be installed. If you're interested, kindly submit a ticket following the instructions in the provided screenshot:
paraphrase this: The one that installed on your laptop is Adobe Reader, which is free and only use for viewing PDF file. Hence this ticket is closed.
The software currently installed on your laptop is Adobe Reader, which is free and solely for viewing PDF files. Therefore, this ticket will now be closed.
